prestazioni: Forged internals upgrade for the LS3 (6.2L V8, 277kW/510Nm) using Manley 4340 steel connecting rods (6.125" length) and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (10.5:1 compression, 4.065" bore) with Total Seal plasma-moly rings for 8,500 RPM stability

Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit (2.3L rotor volume, 10psi boost) with a custom billet 6061-T6 aluminium intake manifold (CNC-machined by Lingenfelter) and a Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump (340 LPH) paired with ID1000X injectors (1,000cc/min) and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU (with flex-fuel ethanol mapping)

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Harrop 3.91:1 LSD (9.5" ring gear) with a billet aluminium differential cover (by PWR), a custom 3.5" driveshaft (carbon fibre, by Driveshaft Shop) and a Tilton twin-disc clutch (7.25" diameter, 1,200Nm torque capacity) with a billet steel flywheel (by Fidanza)
estetica: HSV-specific carbon fibre front splitter (by Seibon Carbon) with integrated air curtains (CNC-machined aluminium ducts) and a custom 3D-printed ABS undertray (by 3D Systems) for 15% front downforce increase at 160km/h

Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (HSV Clubsport R8-specific, by TRA Kyoto) with custom carbon fibre fender flares (2.5" wider front, 3.0" wider rear) and a custom aluminium rear diffuser (by APR Performance) with integrated Gurney flaps (3D-printed titanium)

Full HSV Clubsport R8 interior overhaul: Recaro Pole Position seats (with custom HSV embroidery, by Status Racing) wrapped in Alcantara (by Katzkin) with red stitching, a custom HSV-branded roll cage (T45 steel, by Safety Devices) and a custom carbon fibre dash overlay (by V Carbon)
